extract: The Workout Sea (Japanese: ワークアウトの海 Workout Sea) is a part of the Isle of Armor in the Galar region. It connects to the Stepping-Stone Sea to its west, the Fields of Honor to its north, and Brawlers' Cave to its northeast. There is an NPC at the Workout Sea that can make a Galarica Cuff from 8 Galarica Twigs given to her by the player. She is located in the southwest of the Workout Sea, on a large island with stone arches. Another NPC, referred to as Lady Clear, is located on a small island in the eastern half of Workout Sea. She is able to reset all EVs of a single Pokémon, in exchange for 10 Armorite Ores.
